From her beginning with making classic pipe shapes Anne Julie has since shown the pipe world what pipes also can be. Her unique shaping style with an almost sculptural aproch has made her become one of the absolute giants in pipemaking. This pipe is no exception to this and has the whole essence and ecstatic of what most pipe collectors look for in a pipe from Anne Julie. Handmade from very old aged briar from Corsica. 100% handmade and unique just like Anne Julie in Denmark. With Anne Being 85 years old we do not expect to see a lot of pipes from her hands the coming years. Please note it has some spots on the stem, which is a part of the product.

From the father of modern pipemaking: Sixten Ivarsson, we have this signature shape with absolutely wonderful grain. We believe its from 1973.

Followers of Danish and Swedish handmade pipes will know that a Sixten pipe is the ‘holy grail’ of pipe collecting. If you don’t know that much about Sixten and find yourself being confused over the Sweden versus Denmark thing, he was a Swedish guy living in Copenhagen, Denmark, married to a Danish woman, so he was in a way both Swedish/Danish.
